title: Claude + NotebookLM: Ultimate AI Automation Workflow to Work 10x Faster
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how Claude and NotebookLM integrate to create automated content pipelines. The video covers three workflows: content generation from source materials, infographic creation from PDFs, and browser-based automation using Claude Cowork and Chrome extensions to schedule recurring tasks like weekly AI briefings.
writeup: The video walks through three no-code workflows that pair Claude with NotebookLM for content production. It demonstrates automated content generation from source material, infographic creation from PDFs, and scheduled podcast briefing generation, using Claude Cowork and browser extensions to connect the steps. The focus is practical automation: turning existing documents into finished content and setting recurring tasks rather than running each step by hand.
